vision.response: This is a solid image of a pale pink color.
vision.reasoning_content: The user wants a one-sentence description of the image. 1. Analyze the image: solid block of color. 2. Identify: very light pale pink or baby pink. 3. No objects/text/patterns visible. 4-5. Solid image of pale pink.
vision.notes: DIFFERENT failure mode from Devstral. Model DOES see something image-tokenish but the vision features are degraded to a single 'pale pink' color — color channels or normalization may be wrong. Devstral fabricated unrelated content (office scene). Both fail probe_vision.
